title: Remuneration for administering donations
doc_html:
§386.  Remuneration for administering donations

The boards of education to which any donation has been made in conformity with the provisions of this Part are not entitled to any remuneration for their services in the administration of the same, unless expressly granted in the act of donation.
doc_text:
§386.  Remuneration for administering donations
The boards of education to which any donation has been made in conformity with the provisions of this Part are not entitled to any remuneration for their services in the administration of the same, unless expressly granted in the act of donation.
